MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MEUSER, MARK SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR LAU, SOPHIE

LAW AND MOTION 301, MR. MEUSER IS REQUESTING THE COURT FOR A CONTINUANCE ON THE MATTER DUE TO HIS UNAVAILABILITY ON THIS DATE. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT EMILY CARDENAS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 31, 2008 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. BOTH SIDES TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH COURTESY COPIES PER LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B) BY NOON ON JULY 29, 2008. THE PARTIES MAY STIPULATE TO HAVE IT CONTINUED ON ANOTHER DATE AND MAY APPEAR ON THE EX-PARTE CALENDAR. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-31-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT EMILY CARDENAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 6, 2008 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
